series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Automated Rx Reporting System (OARRS) Personal RX History Report Requests
series_metadata.series_description: When a member of the public wants to request a copy of their personal RX history report they must submit a notarized application. A copy of the application, report furnished and signed receipt is maintained in the Ohio Automated RX Reporting System (OARRS) department.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Original to be scanned to Ohio Automated Rx Reporting System server then shredded. ; Electronic: Scanned copy to be retained on Ohio Automated Rx Reporting System server for 2 years then deleted., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
